title: narcissus × tavaresii
intro: Narcissus × tavaresii is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Narcissus pseudonarcissus and Narcissus tazetta, commonly known as the Tavares daffodil. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Narcissus × tavaresii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the bulbs and flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
